channel.title: Hooting Yard on the Air
channel.description: The complete archive of Hooting Yard on the Air, Frank Key's cult spoken-word radio show of absurdist short stories, originally funded and produced by Resonance104.4 FM and broadcast from 2004 to 2019. Published as an open collection with permission.
channel.copyright: Hooting Yard on the Air was originally funded and produced by Resonance104.4 FM, and is published here as an open collection with permission.
channel.itunes:author: Frank Key
channel.itunes:summary: The complete archive of Hooting Yard on the Air, Frank Key's cult spoken-word radio show of absurdist short stories, originally funded and produced by Resonance104.4 FM and broadcast from 2004 to 2019. Published as an open collection with permission.

item.title: Hooting Yard On The Air: Absence Of Swans
item.description:
Hooting Yard on the Air — Frank Key's cult spoken-word radio show, originally broadcast on Resonance104.4 FM.
Frank Key (1959–2023) was an English writer and broadcaster celebrated for his absurdist short stories. From 2004 he presented Hooting Yard on the Air, reading his own work, on London's Resonance104.4 FM.
00:21 Up In The Mountains 16:05 Absence Of Swans
Hooting Yard on the Air was originally funded and produced by Resonance104.4 FM, and is published here as an open collection with permission. Resonance FM: https://resonancefm.com Original audio and full text: https://archive.org/details/hy0_hooting_yard_2019-07-18

Hooting Yard on the Air — Frank Key's cult spoken-word radio show, originally broadcast on Resonance104.4 FM.
Frank Key (1959–2023) was an English writer and broadcaster celebrated for his absurdist short stories. From 2004 he presented Hooting Yard on the Air, reading his own work, on London's Resonance104.4 FM.
